compiled_state.title: Hardcoded macOS path /Users/joeoakhart committed to repo breaks non-macOS environments
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Bug Description
Several files contain a hardcoded macOS-specific path (`/Users/joeoakhart/...`) that breaks functionality on non-macOS environments (e.g., Linux containers, CI).

## Affected Files
- `CLAUDE.md:3` — Repo root set to `/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra`
- `.claude/dso-config.conf:103` — `dso.plugin_root=/Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/plugins/dso`
- `.dso-plugin-path:1` — full hardcoded cache path
- `plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md:104,110,504` — example paths (lower severity, docs only)

## Reproduction Steps
1. Clone the repo on a Linux machine
2. Run `.claude/scripts/dso ticket list` — fails because the shim resolves the plugin path from `.dso-plugin-path` or `dso-config.conf`, both pointing to a nonexistent macOS path.

## Expected Behavior
Paths should be dynamically resolved (e.g., via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`) rather than hardcoded to a specific user's home directory.

## Actual Behavior
Commands fail with 'command not found' because the resolved plugin path does not exist on the current machine.

## Notes
`tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts.sh:68` already has a grep check for this pattern, suggesting awareness of the issue.

comments.body: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED: safeguard_approval | Code bug: hardcoded macOS path. Fix requires editing CLAUDE.md, dso-config.conf, and .dso-plugin-path (CLAUDE.md is safeguard). Re-run in interactive session to approve.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Hardcoded macOS paths in CLAUDE.md and config.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: Machine-specific paths committed to tracked files. .dso-plugin-path is orphaned (zero references). dso-config.conf breaks dso shim on other machines. CLAUDE.md misleads agent. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: (1) Delete .dso-plugin-path, (2) make dso.plugin_root relative, (3) update CLAUDE.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
